productDisplayName: Nike Women Track Tote Pink Handbag
description: Style Note Leave behind your worries of how to carry your vacation shopping back home with this foldable travel bag from nike. Roll it up into a small ball when not in use and open it for copious space. Product Details Made of 100% polyester for durability and easy maintenance Has one main roomy compartment with a zippered pocket inside  Printed branding on the front Fabric handles to carry style and ease Comes with a detachable pouch to carry essentials Brand tag on the right side Material and Care 100% polyester  Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not machine wash Size  Measurement Height: 35 cm Width:  37 cm Depth: 12 cm
